paths.descriptionEn: Build every component of a Transformer from scratch — activations, normalization, attention, and the full GPT-2 block.
paths.descriptionZh: 从零构建 Transformer 的每个组件——激活函数、归一化、注意力机制到完整的 GPT-2 Block。

paths.descriptionEn: Master every attention variant and position encoding technique — from scaled dot-product to Flash Attention, RoPE, and ALiBi.
paths.descriptionZh: 掌握所有注意力变体和位置编码技术——从缩放点积到 Flash Attention、RoPE 和 ALiBi。

paths.descriptionEn: Build and train a complete GPT — from embeddings and transformer blocks to Adam, cosine LR, and mixed precision.
paths.descriptionZh: 构建并训练完整的 GPT——从 Embedding 和 Transformer Block 到 Adam、余弦学习率和混合精度。

paths.descriptionEn: Speed up inference with KV cache, quantization, and decoding strategies. Scale training with tensor parallelism, FSDP, and ring attention.
paths.descriptionZh: 通过 KV Cache、量化和解码策略加速推理。用张量并行、FSDP 和环形注意力扩展训练规模。

paths.descriptionEn: Implement the loss functions and search algorithms behind modern AI alignment — from reward modeling to PPO and MCTS.
paths.descriptionZh: 实现现代 AI 对齐背后的损失函数和搜索算法——从奖励建模到 PPO 和 MCTS。

paths.descriptionEn: Build a ViT from the ground up — convolutions, patch embeddings, attention, and the full ViT block.
paths.descriptionZh: 从零构建 ViT——卷积、Patch Embedding、注意力机制到完整的 ViT Block。

paths.descriptionEn: From noise schedules to flow matching — implement the core algorithms behind Stable Diffusion 3, Flux, and DiT.
paths.descriptionZh: 从噪声调度到流匹配——实现 Stable Diffusion 3、Flux 和 DiT 背后的核心算法。

paths.descriptionEn: Implement the cutting-edge attention and routing mechanisms powering DeepSeek, Meta, and Microsoft's latest models.
paths.descriptionZh: 实现驱动 DeepSeek、Meta 和微软最新模型的前沿注意力与路由机制。

paths.descriptionEn: Master GNN fundamentals — from basic graph convolution to attention, message passing, and graph-level tasks.
paths.descriptionZh: 掌握图神经网络基础——从图卷积到注意力、消息传递和图级任务。
